name: Associations between phosphodiesterase type 5 inhibitors and vascular function: a systematic review and meta-analysis on randomized-controlled trials.
summary: Systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials published from 1998 to 2022 comparing PDE5 inhibitors with placebo on vascular parameters including blood pressure, pulse wave velocity, carotid intima-media thickness, flow-mediated dilation, peak systolic velocity, endothelial progenitor cells, and related markers.

access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and metadata accessed via NCBI E-utilities; PMC full text identified.
